programme.title: Mr. Majestyk
programme.desc: Cinema tough guy Charles Bronson stars as Majestyk, an ex-con and Vietnam vet, whose efforts to run a farm are thwarted by narrow-minded locals and corrupt cops. But when a Mafia hitman destroys his crop, the farmer's fuse is finally blown.

programme.title: Murphy's Law
programme.desc: Charles Bronson stars as an LAPD cop framed for murder by Joan Freeman, a vicious ex-con he had put in prison. Going on the run and handcuffed to a foul-mouthed petty thief, he attempts to track down Freeman even as she keeps killing his associates.

programme.title: Kinjite: Forbidden Subjects
programme.desc: Action superstar Charles Bronson is at his two-fisted best in this gritty thriller about a hardnosed vice cop who is hellbent on wiping out a child prostitution ring after an assault on his young daughter; taking vengeance into his own hands!

programme.title: Missing In Action
programme.desc: American servicemen are still being held captive in Vietnam – and it's up to one man to bring them home in this blistering, fast-paced action/adventure starring martial arts superstar Chuck Norris.

programme.title: Missing In Action 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: Chuck Norris returns as James Braddock in this action-packed prequel to the original hit film. As war rages in Vietnam, Braddock and his men are captured and imprisoned. With fists and sheer courage, he must become an army of one to save his men.

programme.title: Braddock: Missing In Action III
programme.desc: When Colonel James Braddock (Chuck Norris, "Missing in Action") is told that his wife and 12-year-old son are still alive in Communist Vietnam, he mounts a one-man assault to free them…armed with the latest high-tech firepower, of course!

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The invasion has begun! Patrick Swayze, C. Thomas Howell, Lea Thompson and Charlie Sheen wage unremitting guerilla warfare in defense of their parents, their friends, their town and their country when Communist invaders storm their hometown.

programme.title: Red Dawn (2012)
programme.desc: In this thrilling remake of the 1984 movie, Spokane, Washington, is suddenly invaded by North Korea. Now under enemy occupation, a group of teens form a ragtag resistance unit determined to reclaim their town from its captors! Chris Hemsworth stars.

programme.title: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Charlie Sheen, Michael Biehn and Bill Paxton are three of America's finest Navy commandos. Sent to rescue the crew of a U.S. aircraft carrying Stinger missiles seized by Mideast terrorists, they're thrust onto the frontline of an explosive conflict!

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In the ravaged near-future, a brutal motorcycle gang rules the road, terrorizing innocent civilians. But they underestimate one cop: Max (Mel Gibson). When the bikers brutalize Max's family, they send him into a mad frenzy and a need for revenge!

programme.title: Coffy
programme.desc: Pam Grier stars as Nurse "Coffy" Coffin, a one-woman vigilante force, out to even the score with those who have hooked her sister on drugs. Using her feminine wiles and deadly weapons, Coffy sets about ridding the streets of society's scum.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: Pam Grier portrays one of the screen's first action heroines with humor, sensitivity and steely determination. This electrifying revenge thriller explodes with all the sex appeal and cooler-than-cool attitude of its irresistible leading lady.

programme.title: Blind Rage
programme.desc: They don't need to see to steal! They're five unstoppable blind men. They can hear your heartbeat, smell your fear, and almost taste $15 million in secret CIA loot. Only one man stands in their way. He's the ultimate mercenary, and he doesn't know when to quit. They may be close to the perfect crime, but they'll never know what hit them.

programme.title: Hell Up In Harlem
programme.desc: Recovering from an onslaught of bullets that would have killed a lesser man, the Godfather of Harlem, Tommy Gibbs, is back and is out for revenge against the sleazy New York District Attorney (Gerald Gordon) who had set up the hit-gone-wrong.
